subtitle: Senior Technology Leader -- Contact Center AI | Multi-Platform CC Operator | Pre-Sales AI Advisory
summary_text: Senior technology leader with 14 years operating a national contact center at scale -- Money Management International is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit whose core operation is multi-site CC delivery. As first CTO I owned the three enterprise platforms underneath: a homegrown CRM / everything-tracker, the contact center platform, and the productivity suite that supported agents and supervisors. Led full CC platform transformation -- intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, integrated knowledge bots -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation across enterprise CC platforms, including an evaluation methodology adopted by a national CX consulting firm.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise contact-center AI platforms across NICE / Genesys-tier solutions and AI-focused startups.

Provide pre-sales technical advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete CC platform decisions.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and practitioner workflow on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit operating as a multi-site contact center -- financial counseling, debt management, and consumer financial education delivered through a dedicated 300-person call-center workforce -- multiple regional centers plus roughly 100 individual remote agents -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states and federal regulators (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act).

Owned the homegrown CRM that sat at the core of the organization, supporting all consumer contact (inbound and outbound), program mechanics, reporting, and client financial transactions. The platform predicted, staged, arranged, and produced nearly $1M in daily payments to thousands of creditors on clients' behalf at 100% accuracy year over year; additionally every customer contact across every channel was recorded and facilitated here.

Owned the call center platform -- telephony, routing, outbound dialer campaigns, and integrations into creditor systems, payment processors, regulatory reporting, self-service, training/coaching, and knowledge management. Led the 2024 transformation that introduced intelligent call routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, and integrated knowledge bots -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live.
Owned core enterprise IT services -- Office software, email, file storage, endpoint and network security, identity.

Owned 8-year roadmap for the homegrown CRM platform; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders; multi-product platform extensibility architected from single-product origin.
Modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% YoY.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history; built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

skills.items: Multi-Site CC Operations, Multi-Channel Routing, AI Coaching/Monitoring, Knowledge Bots, CRM Platform Architecture, Productivity Suite Ownership, Telephony / WFM
Claude API, Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms, DataRobot (Production ML)
Data Warehousing, Power BI, Tableau, SQL/T-SQL, Data Governance
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, Cloud Migration
Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, Multi-Stakeholder Roadmap, ePMO Governance
